author: eriiiiika0926
title: The basic features are riddled with bugs and are terrible.
content:
The basic features are riddled with bugs and are terrible. Since I’m a paying user, I’d like to see this fixed.

Some of the songs in my playlists are always skipped. The problem gets worse over time—it happens to about 4 out of every 10 songs. Rebuilding the playlist doesn’t fix it. Note that the source files for these songs are located in the “Files” app on my iPhone.

the time gauge displayed at the bottom of the screen during playback isn’t accurate; if I move it to about 1 minute remaining, it skips to the next song.

I’ll give it 5 stars once this is fixed.

title: Major flaw with large libraries
content:
If you have a large list of music, it won’t show all the songs. it’ll show the first 100 and then you have to manually scroll down, so you can’t use the side scroll bar to navigate the full list quickly.

Also on the “now playing” screen, it’s a bit finicky to swipe down to minimize it. works half the time.

And i know thumbnails are cached, but it still takes a moment for them to appear while scrolling. it’s just not a smooth experience. i have an older iPhone 13 Mini though so that could be part of the problem. 

Everything else works as intended.

author: sudo15162
title: Gute Funktionen, aber kritische Bugs bei den Grundfunktionen
content:
Die App bietet einige nützliche Funktionen, die ich wirklich schätze, z.B. den Sleep Timer. Leider wird die Nutzung durch mehrere Bugs stark beeinträchtigt, die eigentlich die Kernfunktionen einer Musik-App betreffen.

Probleme:
- Seekbar: Zu Beginn eines Songs läuft die erste Sekunde in Zeitlupe – die ersten 2 bis 2,5 Sekunden vergehen, bevor die Wiedergabe normal weiterläuft. Außerdem bleibt der Schieberegler im Kontrollzentrum und auf dem Sperrbildschirm am Ende hängen, wenn man zum vorherigen Song zurückwechselt, nachdem dieser bereits zu Ende gespielt hatte – die Position wird dort nicht korrekt zurückgesetzt.

- Lyrics-Synchronisation: Beim Vor- oder Zurückspulen mit der Seekbar verliert die eingebettete Lyrics-Anzeige die Synchronisation und passt sich nicht korrekt an.

- UI/Design: Das Interface wirkt optisch wenig ansprechend und könnte deutlich modernisiert werden.

Diese Bugs betreffen grundlegende Funktionen einer Musik-App und sollten dringend behoben werden. Das Potenzial der App ist vorhanden; ich hoffe auf baldige Updates.

author: JackJWes
title: Love it!
content: I love this app! They nailed it. As a Neal Morse fan, I have CDs of his albums because most aren’t on Spotify. This is the perfect app for me to play the MP3s downloaded off my CDs. Minimal ads (that don’t show up in between songs at all), strong audio quality, lots of customization and editing available, super easy and quick to upload tracks, and it doesn’t take up a ton of storage. The previous app I tried, with the songs downloaded took up about little over a full gigabyte of storage. Evermusic, with the same songs uploaded, only takes up a little over 500 megabytes. Highly recommend this app!

author: Expattinatore
title: Lettura da cartella sincronizzata con Synology Drive
content:
L'app non permette di aggiungere alla biblioteca la cartella sincronizzata con Synology Drive
Permette solo di aggiungere i file musicali presenti nella cartella
Si è costretti quindi a sincronizzare tali file solo tramite la sincronizzazione con l'app evermusic
Purtroppo, per ben 2 volte, dopo aver effettuata la sincronizzazione, si è verificato un crash che ha cancellato tutti i file dalla cartella locale costringendomi a sincronizzare di nuovo
E comunque non riesce a sincronizzare tutti i file presenti nel mio nas synology
A proposito, se ci sono molti file da sincronizzare, conviene far partire un brano e farlo ripetere all'infinito altrimenti la sincronizzazione si blocca

title: 謎の不具合がある。。
content: 2026.2.8追記。相変わらず突然複数の曲が再生できなくなる。iPhoneのファイルアプリから元データを確認するとデータ自体が壊れているのか追加し直すことができずパソコンから取り込み直しになる。アプリのせいなのかiPhoneが悪いのかわからない…ほんとに不便。2024.1.24追記 バックアップから復元すると20曲ほど再生されなくなります。アップデートでの対応が難しいなら音楽ファイルとの紐付けが外れてしまったときに簡単に紐付け直す機能を追加してほしいです。毎回大変すぎます。 2024.1.8追記 アップデートにより不具合が解消されたみたいで感謝です。色々試しましたが私には一番合っているアプリでいつもお世話になっています。(ファイル(アプリ)上からデータを読み込めるのが大きい) これからもお世話になります。 (以前の投稿) いつからかわかりませんが複数の曲が再生されなくなりました。いつもシャッフルで聴いているので気づくのが遅れました。早急に修正をお願いいたします。

author: 8HJJ
title: 肝心の再生機能に
content:
致命的なバグがある。
・プレイリストのキューの一曲目が終わると再生が止まる。二曲目の時もあれば三曲目の時もある。その都度再生ボタンを押さなくてはならない。ふざけてんのか。
・特定の曲の最後の1秒がカットされて次の曲に行ってしまう。再インストール、iOS再起動当然試したが再現性100%。単体で聞く時はちゃんと最後まで演奏される。
有料版すぐ解約しました。オンキヨーダイレクトの方が1000倍マシ。オンキヨーもAppleミュージックに連動させなくてはいけない(CDの現物から落とした音源はiTunesから引っ張ってこないといけない)のがクソだけど、苦労してでもそっちを頑張りましょう。
このアプリもGoogleドライブからスルッとファイル持って来れていいわぁ〜と思ったんですけどね。音質も良かった。けれど再生がバグまみれなら何にもならない…。

author: Wisdom Seeker 1950
title: New Happiness
content:
For several years I have been very happy with a different media play app.  There were two easy ways to download audio files into that app resident on my iPhone from OneDrive.  Both of those methods no longer work following the past several iOS updates.
Evermusic downloads from OneDrive.  I love the tone quality,  it’s great even streaming to hear aids.  Ya know they gota have tiny speakers.

title: 居然支持歌词了，好评
content: 。23年就下载过这个应用，当时他不支持歌词，然后就给他给了一星，因为它的其他体验上面来说非常完美，就是不支持歌词，所以希望他能修改，后面有一段时间没再用苹果手机，最近才开始用，然后下载这个应用，发现 居然可以调整歌词，而且还可以支持在这个应用里头修改图片，然后歌曲的信息属性那些，完全不需要下载第三方应用，你还省了一份钱（ App store里头那些修改歌词属性的软件都很贵，最低都是100多块钱，完全不值得，），非常完美，而且它这个歌词也支持的很完美，就是不是就是不知道在车载上会是什么效果，我现在车不在跟前回去以后我再试一下车是什么效果。

author: Bernard Corvus
title: Средняя альтернатива Эппл Музыке
content:
Плохо работает кэширование (по крайней мере лосслесс). Сперва оооооочень медленно добавляет альбом в медиатеку. Потом буквально каждый раз заново загружает трек при каждом воспроизведении (если отключен оффлайн мод). За городом это проблема 😣 

Оффлайн режим только по подписке. Что бессмысленно, если ищешь замену стриммингам 🤷🏻‍♂️

Перегруженный и запутанный UI. Например, загрузка треков отображается не в загрузках, а на экране, на который попадаешь тапнув по иконке со стрелками — почему? Почему нельзя было сделать список загрузок на экране загрузок? Это же логично

Резюмирую. В целом, плеер нормальный для разовой покупки (и он мной куплен). Можно смириться с неудобствами. Но в контексте подписки в нём нет смысла, он проигрывает Эппл Музыке, Спотифаю, Тидалу, Дизеру и остротным стримингам в плане удобства в зоне хорошего интернета. В общем, перешёл на vlc, который не особо заточен под аудио, зато не тупит при переходе на следующий трек

author: Alexlex89
title: Extrem Gut
content: Diese App bietet alles, was man sich wünscht, sofern man neben Streaming auch aktiv Alben besitzen und auf dem IPhone hören will. Einfach die eigenen Dateien innerhalb des Players verknüpfen und man hat das alte Feeling eines eigenen MP3-Players wieder, was das überfrachtete Streaming wunderbar ergänzt. Der Equalizer ist hervorragend, die App ist sehr perdonalisierbar und es ist sogar ein Einmalkauf ohne Abo möglich. Der etwas hohe Preis ist durchaus angemessen. Die Entwickler gehen auf Feedback ein, verbessern die App und haben sie sogar ans Liquid Glas Design angepasst. Ich bin mehr als zufrieden.

title: A way to listen to ALL of my music
content: I had forgotten that I paid for the upgraded version years ago when I was trying to listen to music that existed on my phone because Apple Music is weird and particular and doesn't let you play things that happen to exist in different spaces. I have a massive music library on OneDrive and different files that I download from Patreon or wherever and it is great to FINALLY be able to play all of them. I wish there was a better "how to" for the app (although there might be now) but I currently am not sure about the difference between offline music and some of the other designations. And that's okay, because I'm probably going to clear the downloads etc out and start over. It's just refreshing to have access to everything. Now we just need better carplay integration.

author: Biblesje
title: Deleting files
content: I’ve used the premium version of the Evermusic app for years and I’ve always been very happy with it, but since the last two updates, it seems like it’s impossible to delete music files from the app. I delete them from the download folder and I remove them from the library, but whenever I refresh the app, they’re still there. I’ve tried disconnecting the app from my cloud service, but the files are still there, and it’s still taking up space on my phone. Before when I deleted files from the download folder, they were gone from the phone and I could tell by the amount of space used on the phone. I tried offloading the app and reinstalling that didn’t help. I had to delete the app entirely to remove everything and then reinstall it, which is very annoying.

author: Daniel Goebel
title: Endlich eine Alternative zu Apple‘s Musik-App
content: Da man seit dem iPhone 16 aus mir völlig unerklärlichen Gründen keine von CDs digitalisierte Musik mehr über iTunes übertragen kann, habe ich eine Alternative zur Musik-App von Apple gesucht und mit dieser nur eine Alternative gefunden. Das Übertragen der Musik funktioniert kinderleicht und auch das Design der App ist toll. Am meisten beeindruckt mich die Vielfalt der Einstellungs-Optionen! Zum Glück wird einem auch eine nahtlose Wiedergabe bei Live-Alben  ermöglicht, was für mich besonders wichtig ist. Leider ist auch diese App nicht absolut perfekt. Ich höre lediglich über Bluetooth und legt man das iPhone komplett beiseite, wird die Musik ohne Probleme abgespielt, wenn man die App allerdings im Hintergrund laufen lässt und nebenbei andere Apps öffnet, um etwas zu machen, gibt es immer wieder kurze Störungen bzw. Unterbrechungen beim Abspielen. Ich weiß nicht, an was das liegt, an der Bluetooth-Verbindung jedenfalls nicht. Wäre echt schön, wenn das noch behoben werden könnte, dann wäre die App wirklich perfekt!

author: TuttlePier
title: Lentezza insostenibile...
content: Non c'è molto da dire... la sincronizzazione con la libreria locale é di una lentezza assoluta. 3 giorni per completare lo scan dei file...imbarazzante. Inoltre aggiungere nuova musica é una sofferenza infinita, con musica che non compare dopo l'aggiunta, o che compare parzialmente...o che richiede altrettanti giorni prima di comparire. Inoltre non legge i .cue per i FLAC, per cui tocca splittare i file...che è una roba che si faceva 15 anni fa. App oscena.

author: なまえはとくにない
title: ありがたいです
content: 不具合追記　お気に入り内のフォルダを整理しようとすると挙動がおかしく、フォルダを別フォルダに入れるなどの操作ができません。／無料でありがたいです。下記のような微妙に惜しい点もありますが非常に役立ってます。惜しい点→日本語のファイルを読み込むと再生画面では曲名が文字化けして読めなくなります（リスト表示では文字化けしていないのですが）。 それから、iPhoneからインポートした音楽がどこに入っているか分かりづらい、また、フォルダをそのままプレイリストに追加することはできない（追加すると中の曲だけ追加されて、フォルダの階層は消えてしまう）など、細かい部分が使いづらく、惜しいと感じます。あと、倍速再生が音楽再生画面からは設定できず、わざわざ設定を開く手間がかかります。UIには改善の余地があると思います。

author: Zhicheng86
title: The Ultimate Cloud Music Player
content: Evermusic is an outstanding music player for iOS! The app’s ability to sync music from multiple cloud services and organize my library seamlessly is a game-changer. content:

Muchas gracias.

author: piwhybee
title: Problème majeur
content:
Màj : Un problème majeur rend l'utilisation de cette appli sérieusement impossible sur mon iPhone 15 Pro sous iOS 18. L'audio est interrompu pendant un quart de seconde environ toutes les minutes. Cela n'arrive pas avec d'autres lecteurs audio, y compris celui d'Apple. Tant que le problème ne sera pas résolu, il est pour moi hors de question de dépenser la vingtaine d'euros demandée pour la version payante de cette application. Dommage car je pensais avoir trouvé le saint Graal...! On verra si le développeur consulte les avis et fait quelque chose. 

Acheter l'application me tente, entre autres en raison de la présence d'un minuteur pour arrêter automatiquement la musique après un temps défini. Il manque la possibilité d'ajouter un fade out pour baisser progressivement le son. Pour l'instant la coupure brutale ce qui du coup me réveille par ce silence subit alors que ce n'est pas l'effet recherché j'imagine ;-)

author: The best app I’ve found
title: Not bad…not great
content: The app is just okay and nothing more (and I have the premium version) Using two basic features like gapless playback and the equalizer together at the same time do not work correctly because transitions between songs are not smooth like they should be, 10 seconds before a track ends it cuts off for a second before the next track starts. I’ve tried changing to the core audio player but that is even worse as it skips through tracks in the playlist. I’ve asked for this to be fixed about 5 months ago but it still hasn’t. This app could be so much better but all the focus goes on fixing the wrong things.

author: AntoQC
title: En général, Evermusic est une bonne application. C’est très utile et je m’en sert souvent!
content:
Evermusic est une bonne application qui fait amplement le travail pour écouter de la musique et faire des playlist avec des fichiers. En général, l’application fonctionne bien. Par contre, j’ai rencontré quelques bugs comme par exemple :
1 - Quand j’ajoute une musique à une playlist, elle ne s’ajoute pas.
2 - Quand je modifie les balises audio et que j’ajoute une photo de couverture à mon fichier, la photo ne s’ajoute pas.
3 - Quand j’appuie sur la musique pour la faire jouer, la musique ne veut pas jouer.
C’est à cause de ces bugs que je ne met pas 5 étoiles, mais sinon le reste est très bien et j’apprécie beaucoup cette application!

そもそもMP3をダウンロードしにくいのがカス

何回もアプリを落としたり、最悪スマホの再起動までしてやっとダウンロードできる
あとmp3の削除がどうやってもできない
Q&Aの手順を踏んでもできない

これはもう完全に役立たずで怒り心頭であります

author: jmwd_4
title: Phenomenal - Only thing I use
content:
I’ve been using this app since 2021 and it’s honestly a godsend. Frequent updates, no subscription - just an optional one time payment for a couple extra bits (e.g. unlimted playlist and queue size) and I’m pretty sure it was only a tenner (although I payed it about 2 years ago so I’m not sure whether that’s changed), simple yet effective, equalizer is great, customisable in the right ways so you can just make the app do your own thing, and it just does what you need - no more and no less. 
Personally I download the songs myself into my phones files, and then move them to evermusic, so I’ve never explored to see if I could actually have just done it through the app and saved myself hours but hey that’s on me, not the app. And even without that sort of access it still functions fantastic just as an audio player. It’s not trying to do things you don’t want or need, which I appreciate. 
If you’ve got the time and patience to spare just getting the music yourself, you’ll save yourself thousands in music subscriptions, and if for some reason this app isn’t for you, at least it cost you nothing but a little time. And of course if you do love it like me, let the developer know! 
Thanks for this, it’s the best I could ask for.

author: Sweatybetty4me
title: Superb Free Music Player, Works Well With Sonos/Airplay/Bluetooth Speakers
content: I have a vast number of albums in MP3 format on a NAS (WD MyCloud) which I have struggled for years piping it through Plex (because of song number limitations in Sonos library) playing through Sonos and more recently trouble with a more than useless updated Sonos app. Constantly losing Plex connections, trouble with MyCloud and Plex “talking” to each other etc. This music app/player/organiser seems to be the answer to my prayers, why did I not spot it years ago? It will find all your albums on the MyCloud NAS and through the magic of “Airplay” play them all through my 12 Sonos speakers (tip: link your none airplay Sonos speakers to an Airplay enabled Sonos speaker).TBH, so far, the free version with some ads has been terrific and for just 99p per month, if you want the Premium version without ads, it seems a no brainer! No need to download any albums, songs onto my iPhone etc it will just play them from where they sit on my NAS, no mess!

author: BlueGlassBoy
title: Truly game changing tech for audiophiles (with one request!)
content:
This app has revolutionised my listening and audio planning - its versatility, simple design and intelligent planning all make for a great experience. Having seen many of the early glitches get worked out and smoothed off has been a real treat to behold. I have an audio library of some 40k+ titles, and a very particular way of cataloguing and enjoying them, so Evermusic has been terrific.

I do have one continuing request however: some way of contains and dividing up Playlists. The playlist function is excellent but, if anything, too simple - I have masses of playlists based on Mood or season or personal preference, and they are becoming unwieldy. Some sort of ‘Playlist Folder’ option would be very greatly appreciated, to help organise those playlists. 

Keep up the great work!

author: Supaman_15
title: 機能◎！広告は許す。だがしかし、音は巻き戻るのなぁぜなぁぜ？
content:
プレイリスト内の音楽の並べ替えや、曲に画像を追加するなど、自分がやりたいと思ったことはだいたいできるので、機能は十分だと思います。

改善してほしいことはは操作性くらいですね。(画像を追加する時に一つ一つやらないといけないことや、"接続"の中身が見にくいことくらいです。)

広告は、1日に1〜2回ほど５秒くらいのものが流れるのと、プレイリストの画像を表示する時に毎回広告の×ボタンを押さないといけない(押したら毎回有料プランへの勧誘画面が入る)ことなので、まあストレスは少ないと思います。

ただし、音はとてもバグります。具体的には
「特定のファイルの特定の場所で最初から再生される(巻き戻ってしまう)」です。

しかもこの不具合は、iCloudから音源をこのアプリに写す時点で起きています。なので、直しようがありません。
(ファイルを一度アプリから消して、再ダウンロードしようとしましたが、元が消えていなく、頑張って消したが結局変わらずでした。)

この音のバグのせいで今後のこのアプリを使用するかを悩まされます。

author: Дмитрий Зикоткин
title: Лучшее обновление!!! А в общем….
content:
Честно - очень-очень обрадовался, что цвет загрузки приложения теперь такой же как и иконка приложения!!!

Теперь в общем:

Из плюсов-
1) Очень удобный плеер (я лично использую только для прослушивания скаченной музыки), настройка и интерфейс понятен.
2) Очень много тем приложения (несколько видов светлой и темной темы)
3) Много красивых иконок приложения (Мне черная нравится)))

По минусам-
1) Редактор тегов немного косой (Долго грузит, не всегда сохраняет)
2) У меня в очередном обновлении просто потерялась песня (по сути есть - показывается как и все остальные, но по факту ее нет - нажмешь, и включается другой трек), грустно
3) АУДИОТЕГИ СЛОМАЛИ ВАРВАРЫ!!!! На 12-ом не работает вообще!

Итог-
Если не прикапываться в редактору тегов- то приложение топ!

Lorsque l’on navigue par artistes, les titres des albums sont alignés à la suite au lieu d’être regroupés par albums. On a donc en visu Artistes/ensembles des titres au lieu d’avoir Artistes/Albums/Titres.

author: Koz'ma
title: My review
content: Great app! I’ve been using it for 7 years now - for offline listening to audiobooks previously downloaded to my phone. I haven't found another application that is more convenient for me. The set of functions matches my needs when listening to audio books. I can only say about one drawback - for developers. Audio books, as a rule, consist of several dozen and sometimes hundreds of files. The application plays them all in turn, remembering which fragment I stopped at when I pressed pause. When I go back to listening, the app starts playing the book from the same place. BUT SOMETIMES, when it has already played more than several hundred files, it spontaneously stops, and DOESN'T REMEMBER which file was the last one. Could you fix thi bag, please?

Ich nutze Evermusic seit 4 Jahren, hatte nie Probleme und meiner Meinung nach, war es die beste Music-Player App die ich bisher hatte. Allerdings gibt es seit einigen Wochen massive Probleme, sodass einzelne Tracks aus der App geworfen werden, Playlists nicht geladen werden und die Dauer der Tracks urplötzlich 12 Stunden lang ist. 
Ich hab’s leider nicht gefixt bekommen und werde eine andere App nutzen müssen, da ich meine Musik dann doch eher hören wollen würde als an einer App festzuhalten.

content: Downloads 파일이 주기적으로 동기화를 하면서 Downloads 파일의 음악 동기화가 아닌 무작위의 파일에도 저장하지 않은 앨범의 스크린샷이나 파일에 저장을 하지 않은 매모를 다운로드 하여(특히 메모는 9번 가량 반복하였다, 어제 적은 메모 54mb짜리도 어제 새벽 2시48분,2시49분 하루만에 벌써 108mb의 용량을 차지 하였습니다. 때문에 나의 폰이 저장공간이 사라져 버벅임이 발생함을 인지하였고 알아본 결과 이는 3월2일 부터 시작되었습니다. 이문제가 나의 잘못이라면 해결방법을 알려주시거나 앱의 문제라면 빠른시일 내의 해결을 부탁드립니다.

author: 大木墩子
title: 关于歌词的问题（最终版）
content:
这篇评论可能有点长，导致本人在语言思路整理上可能有点问题。 

如果看本人码字的内容没看懂，或者觉得篇幅太长，请直接点灰色的三点标记，点评论，再点右上角的蓝色问号，进官方页面翻译英文看怎么添加歌词，他毕竟是图文都有，更直观一点，看不懂英文就翻译，反正选中句子长按也能直接弹出翻译功能

首先得感谢在本评论日期之前一篇繁体字的评论，感谢里面提出的思路，让本人找到了添加字幕的方法。 首先，各位得准备两样东西。一个是音乐本身，另一个是lrc格式的歌词文件。点开歌曲边上蓝色的三个点的标识，选择编辑音频标签，往下拉到“评论”这里，把lrc文件用电脑记事本那个方式打开，带上时间轴一起粘贴进去保存。播放的时候，右上角点开那个评论键，应该就能直接有比较生硬的滚动字幕了。 如果这个功能用的比较频繁，那就还是在右上角灰色的三个点那里点开，往下拉到设置，选个性化，拉到下面把评论勾上，然后各位就可以在播放界面点均衡器右边那个按键，实现专辑封面、播放列表和歌词的切换啦。
因为本人是第一次用这个app，之前用的另一款宝藏app叫“本地音乐”，在app store里直接搜索这个名字应该也能搜出来。因为那个app既不支持carplay，也没有均衡器供人调节，flac的歌曲还不能显示封面，所以选择了这个尝试。因为给这个评论码字的时候是直接在evermusic里面评星就手评论的，所以有些步骤可能有遗漏，有些按键名称不够准确，还望各位见谅。

祝各位用的愉快。

author: jmsehrrsn
title: Not as good as the reviews
content: This app is frustratingly inconsistent. While it performs adequately at times, it frequently falters and feels overly complicated, lacking a clear purpose. It attempts to emulate various platforms like Dropbox, Apple Music, and Spotify, but fails to excel at any. The interface is subpar, feeling like an afterthought rather than a well-designed feature. Connectivity with Dropbox, in my experience, is unreliable, often resulting in playback issues such as buffering and interruptions, even on a functioning fiber broadband connection. Despite meticulously organising album covers and artwork in relevant folders, the app no longer displays them as it did in the past, indicating a lack of ongoing development and maintenance. It's a shame because the concept had promise, but the execution falls short.

author: Robert Stollar
title: Well worth the money
content:
Tried Apple Music and Spotify and found them lacking in what I needed – to be able to utilise my existing vast collection of music without having to pay a subscription. And yes, you can use your own music with both of the above providers, but there were too many glitches and I just want to listen to my own music.
It is suprisingly hard to find a music player that does what it needs to do – play music. Evermusic does that and much more. It is packed with features, cloud connectivity and syncing between devices. I found it well worth the money.

title: mit Abstand beste Music-app
content: Ich habe einen langen Trauermarsch durch die Musikapps im Apple-store hinter mir und kann jedem nur empfehlen diese App als erste auszuprobieren. Heute lade ich meine umfangreiche CD-Sammlung, jede einzelne CD als mp3 hoch auf Onedrive, geht vom Laptop vollautomatisch, und von dort super easy mit Evermusic runter aufs ipad. Alles gut organisiert mit Ordner. Es gibt ein paar Kleinigkeiten, die ich verbessern würde, aber im Gegensatz zu den anderen Apps ist hier alles selbsterklärend und super gelöst. Danke Leute, das war eine schöne Erfahrung!

author: litriss
title: Un desastre perdí toda mi música cuidado!
content:
Tengo varios reproductores no me gusta depender de la conexión a internet.

Pues todas las app usan mi música almacenada en el iPhone. 

Creo listas y acceden a esa carpeta y la reproducen la borro y borran la información pero no el archivo. 

Quería probar esta app y he creado mis listas una a una y no me gusto mucho por el límite por no ser premium y como en otras borro las listas, hasta aquí todo bien pero me voy a mis app y no existe mi música 🤦🏻‍♂️

Resulta que está App borro toda mi base de datos de música que recopile increíble ni siquiera la envío a la papelera. 

Cuidado con esta app que te destroza todo lo que escuches!

Solo tenia que borrarse la lista o sea la información de donde está ese fichero pero no en fichero en si!

Otras app se cargan dentro de su app y si borran la borran de su almacenamiento pero no de la fuente original. 

Mi mal me destrozo toda mi base de datos ahora me toca volver a crear cientos y cientos de horas de reproducción!!!

author: 으흐으으흠
title: 기능적으로 완벽히 쓰레기
content:
클라우드같은 기능 안 쓰고, 내 음악 파일 플레이어로 썼다.

_import 폴더에 음악을 넣어도 인식이 되지 않음
하나하나 수동으로 파일 경로를 인식시켜야 함.
종종 한 파일이 목록에 2개로 표시됨
둘 중 하나를 목록에서 지우면 나머지 한 파일도 먹통이 되며 앱도 잠시 먹통이 됨
같은 이름의 앨범 태그가 붙은 파일들을 별개의 앨범으로 인식함
Mp3tag로 동일함을 확인했음에도, 왜인지 모르지만 서로 다른 파일들로 인식됨
태그 수정 기능을 체험판에선 막아뒀는데, 체험판이라서 막힌 거라는 표시가 명확하지 않음

장점
광고가 짜증나는 수준이 아님
인터페이스가 무난하고 중국어가 안 써있음
백그라운드 재생이 지원됨

진작에 도태됐어야 할 코드 뭉치. 애플 사의 앱스토어가 얼마나 멍청하고 불편한지 알 수 있는 앱이다.

author: iiRatchett
title: Excelente
content: La aplicación ha mejorado muchísimo en cuanto a diseño y rendimiento. El nuevo diseño en el reproductor es muy atractivo, ahora se pueden distinguir mejor los títulos de las canciones. El rendimiento a cuánto consumo de batería ha mejorado. Algunas ideas próximas que puedan implementar serían: Una opción de personalización que cambie el esquema de color tomando el color predominante de la portada del álbum. También que se pueda ajustar el nivel de desenfoque del fondo del reproductor.

author: BenAJN
title: Close to great
content:
Evermusic is a pretty solid app once you've got to grips with it but the are many, many failures of clarity from a UX standpoint. It's extremely unclear when a given action has had an effect or whether it's failed. The user is forced to investigate the matter themselves. If the action has failed the user then has to deduce why and how to fix the issue. No error message is given, no explanation, it's all just left to troubleshoot on the user end.

But all of that I can forgive to some extent. I don't know the size of the team that worked on this app. What I can't forgive is paywalling "offline mode". In other words, making the user pay to download files from their own cloud services, something the user could do simply by navigating to the Files app.

I'm more than happy to support apps I use a lot, there's no need for those kinds of practices.

Schade, ansonsten sieht die App nämlich sehr vielversprechend aus.

author: Ben122990
title: Great music player - except one issue
content: This app is a very good music player overall. I use it mainly to stream music from my DLNA server (Asus router).  The only issue I have is that the album art for FLAC tracks won’t show. If I download a FLAC track to the local music library, the cover shows up fine. VLC is able to display the album cover for FLACs correctly when streaming off DLNA so it sounds like a glitch of Evermusic.  I let the developer know several months ago so hopefully a fix will be on the way soon.

author: birukoff niger
title: Есть нерешенные проблемы
content:
В целом, приложение хорошее. Перешел потому что внутренним проигрывателем IPhone пользоваться невозможно. Понравились функции эквалайзера и скорости воспроизведения песен, а также «продолжить проигрывание» после выключения приложения. Теперь к минусам. Обновления выкатываются регулярно, при этом основные проблемы остаются без изменений:
- раз в 50/60 песен одновременно включаются сразу две песни. Опыт, конечно, бывает интересный, но лучше это пофиксить.
- вкладка песен из внутренней памяти телефона зачем-то убрана в самый низ меню.
- общее время проигрывания плейлистов отображается некорректно с очень большой ошибкой.
- если общий список песен не промотать в самый низ, то за полный цикл проигрывания будет только часть песен.

author: CommCube13
title: Great App!
content:
Evermusic is a great alternative to having my songs in the Apple Music app because it gets rid of all the extraneous stuff and narrows it down to just my library. There’s an option to move your songs over from the Apple app, which was nice, and then I can just add mp3 files. I very much appreciate the fact that the app finds the album covers! It’s not always accurate—sometimes it brings up a compilation that has that song (like “Now That’s Music!”) or a remix and doesn’t even pay attention to the album name—but most of the time it gets the job done, and I can just send myself the album cover from the internet and add it manually if needed. 

Many of the other apps I found have unlimited access to music and videos, which I don’t want (I like having my phone very locked down), and this app does not have that! Much appreciated. 

My only two complaints are, first, that when I have the phone plugged into CarPlay (which doesn’t show up on the car screen because I have Siri turned off) the images (covers) don’t show up on the phone, which makes it annoying to quickly find songs at stoplights. Second, the Audio Tag Editor won’t let me edit the tags for some instrumentals that I downloaded. I don’t know if it’s because they’re not “real songs” or something, but the option would be nice.

Other than that, very well made app. Would recommend.

author: Oscar Khuong
title: EXCELLENT, however could be better
content:
The app provide some unique functions that hardly can find them all together on the other apps

• Mix audio: can play music background, in parallel with any other app without interuption.
• Sleep time setting
• Multiple cloud supports: can play music files offline on many cloud services
• “Bookmarking” the songs for nexy time play
• Speed tuner
• Equalizer

HOWEVER, can be better if they improve / adding below features and become leader:
• Sync playlist / folders accross platforms & devices
• Independent volume tuner without interfere phone’s master volume
• Duet player between multiple smartphone to simulate surrounding sounds.
• Play video
• Work better with Apple Watch / Airpod Pro
• Work better with Shortcuts by iOS
• See meta data

author: Красно Девитса
title: Free Evermusic > Most other music streaming services
content:
Yes, there are some ads, but they’re either not intrusive at all (on top of playlist cover and you can just click on the X and there will be a screen pop-up stating that it’s possible to purchase premium) or a single short video ad every once in a while. And it is automatically muted. Compared to the free version of Spotify in terms of music streaming quality, this is like comparing the size of a person to the biggest star in our universe. 

There are sometimes slight bugs, but generally it’s really not bad. I really love the feature that looks for data about the song on the internet given limited data (eg only the song name). 

Devs, thank you for such an amazing app that is amazing without forced payment. And even the premium version is a lifetime price of what would be a single month subscription for Spotify.

author: WGWeb
title: Great App For Offline Listening of Personal Collection
content:
I’m a bit old school. I have tons of music on CD and Vinyl albums that I have converted to digital files. I’m also cheap and don”t want to spend money buying digital versions of stuff I already own.

Don’t like Apple music (or Google) when I’m trying to access my personal collection online or off-line. This app does the job very well allowing me to store my personal collection on an online drive (I use Dropbox, OneDrive and Google Drive) and then download it locally when I’m not going to be connected to the internet (hiking, air travel, etc) It’s a very robust app with a lot of great features and plays all the audio formats I use.

Only complaint (and reason for my 4 vs 5 start) is that the UI could be more intuitive. I keep having to remember where stuff is. The App does so much/ has so many options that it’s probably hard to organize all the functionality into easy and logical navigation. Keep refining, team. It’s improving with each update! Other than that, the App works great and does exactly what I need it to do.

author: um taym 209
title: Suggestions!!
content:
Hello, thank you for an amazing app. I have some feedback. There are some features i’d love to see in the app, and i’m sure other users are gonna like.

Fix Speed feature. The speed feature is nice, but the pitch stays the same when speeding a song up. This causes the song to sound weird. It would be amazing if when you speed a song up, the pitch changes as well. 

Add an option to add multiple artists. Some songs have multiple artists on them, or features. You can add multiple artists by just typing them, but in the Artists tab, the song gets saved under a different artist, as them merged. It would be nice if we can save the song under specific artists by being able to add multiple artists. Like if a song is by ‘A’ and features ‘B’, it would be saved under ‘A’ and ‘B’ separately instead of being under ‘A ft. B’. 

Add a lyrics feature. This is very useful. The lyrics can be synched. The user can automatically generate the lyrics just like the metadata, so they don’t have to manually enter it. Then they can switch lyrics on or off as they please. And it would be fantastic if lyrics could be synchronized for offline use.

Add a widget option. It would be really nice to have a widget of our currently playing song/ last played song on our homescreen. 

That’s it for this time. I really hope you add these features to the app. I recommend this app to all my friends and family. Thank you for the hard work Everappz!

title: CarPlay needs work. STILL.
content: UPDATE 1: you say that you’ve fixed this, well you haven’t. CarPlay is still rubbish. When I change the equaliser settings on my phone and save them they do not update to the car. Should have the option for user to select which buttons they want and hide the ones they don’t use. I’ve paid £9.99 for this and it really needs work done. Not very happy with its issues.

author: M. Dietzi
title: Hammer App
content:
Ich habe mind. 20 Apps geladen, probiert und gelöscht. Durch Zufall stieß ich auf diese App. Genau diese habe ich, so wie sie ist, gebraucht. Ein großer Dank an den Entwickler!!!!! Songs auf's IPad und los geht's. Die Warteschlange ist gut als Playliste und ich kann jederzeit Titel hinzufügen, ohne Störungen im Abspiel.
2 Fragen hätte ich an den Entwickler: Wäre es möglich, gespielte Titel automatisch aus der Warteschlange zu entfernen??? Kann man die Funktion einbauen, dass die Stille am Ende eines Songs erkannt wird und somit der nächste Song eher losläuft??? Der Media Monkey auf Windows macht das hervorragend (kleiner Tipp). Nochmal großes Lob und Dankeschön für diese geile App!!!

播放列表排序更是有点琢磨不透虽然作者提供了例如日期等排列方式但是导入的时候还是发现排列方式的奇特，最让人窒息的是不能自己手动调整排列位置而且自己创建的播放列表排列也是不能自己调👍

author: 55tyres
title: Excellent music player
content:
I’ve checked out numerous music player apps and Evermusic is by far the best. It’s simple & straightforward to connect to cloud services and any other music sources on my iPad. It’s fully featured with offline playback, auto sync, playlists & even a built in equaliser. The design & layout is easy to navigate and intuitive.
I have only one minor quibble: Crossfade playback is fine but not suitable for all albums. I have many albums where songs segue into one another and crossfade spoils the transitions. Hopefully gapless playback will be included in future versions.
I’ve told friends about Evermusic and those who’ve tried it agree with me: It’s the best music player available. Highly recommended.

author: Allan@JP
title: Best offline player I’ve used
content:
Evermusic has proved to be the best offline music player yet for me. It allows imports from Apple Music, iTunes as well as computers or online streams. After years of putting up with Apple Music dropping out and variable quality of playback I’m impressed to find an app that streams well to my hearing aids without the previous fluctuations of sound levels and quality. An added feature is the ability to sort alphabetically or by artists etc and a high quality search engine.

After seeing the options available I was happy to purchase the premium app after only using the free app for a couple of hours.

All I can say is keep up the great work.

Lo único que quiero es descargarme toda la música del Dropbox y me la ponga a reproducir aleatoriamente offline en el coche, porque las rutas que tomo son largas (de más de una hora) y cada dos por tres no hay internet para descargar nada. 

He pagado esto para estar más tiempo silenciado sin poder escuchar que oyendo música. Ya tengo activadas todas las opciones de búfer y ayudas a la reproducción por conexión lenta.

author: swenysk
title: Outstanding
content:
I really like the feature of syncing music from Samba share. Great selection of protocols and online services.

However CarPlay interface would need some serious love, it’s very plain with almost no control (buttons like play all / shuffle all songs in playlist missing)

Also shortcuts integration would be great at least minimal for playlists and play pause. This would give us control in car to play our playlist with voice. That would at least partially supplement missing Siri integration.

Even considering those downsides, I’m happy that I don’t have to go through painful iTunes music loading no more. It’s worth it.

author: Tom-18-89
title: Beste Musikapp für ios ever
content:
Hab mir sehr rasch die pro / Premium-Version gekauft. Da diese wie viele bereits geschrieben haben eine dauerhafte Lizenz und kein Abo (wie vieles heutzutage) ist, ist die Kaufversion jeden Cent wert. Kann einfach alles diese App. Viele Einstellmöglichkeiten (Equalizer, Liederübergänge uvm.) einfach super.

Und das entscheidende was viele brauchen ist natürlich die Anbindung an fast alle namhaften Cloudanbieter (OneDrive, Google drive, Dropbox usw) um einfach und schnell Lieder zu importieren und mit wenigen Klicks offline verfügbar zu machen und auch offline abzuspielen geht einfach und schnell = alles in allem eine nahezu perfekte App. Hoffentlich bleibt das so und sie ändern niemals das Geschäftsmodell :)

author: Troz 166
title: Works OK, lacks a couple of things
content:
I intend to use this app just to play music in offline mode, ie files stored on the phone. 

It took me a while to get it working - the “Wi-Fi drive” feature did not work for me. However it found the NAS on my home network and I was able to download files from there. 

What I would like to do is use it like I play music on my computer. My music is organised in folders grouped by style, era and so forth. So I would like to be able to navigate quickly through the folders hierarchy and play everything in a folder. But if you do that in this app it plays the tracks in alphabetical order, not sorted by the track number tag. 

You can play tracks in the right order if you play albums from the “Album” tab, like on an old fashioned iPod, so that is acceptable. 

I queried this through the support form in the app and an answer came back in a few hours, so good developer support.

author: Acorpze
title: One of the best so far
content:
From all music players I have tried, this one works decently well.
Can play my high quality/bitrate audio files very well.

The equalizer is certainly nice, most apps make you pay for full equalizer access and being able to play in the background.
Still miss audio normalization though, some of my audio is recorded at a different volume.

Love the queue feature, I can queue a entire playlist and set it on repeat/shuffle or just queue single songs.
I find this a very important feature in music players along with the equalizer.

I already have my music sorted in folders on my computer so whenever I import it to this app it’s really nice that I can just select a few folders and add all of it’s contents to a playlist, makes life so much easier.

I’ve had no real issues with the app so far other than audio normalization and music being at different volumes.

author: Materico
title: Fantastica anche per i files!
content:
Allora, questa app ha risolto un problema apparentemente stupido, ma che su iPhone sembra un casino.
Lo chiedo anche a voi: che si fa se le vostre playlist in cloud, in seguito ad aggiornamento ad iOS 15, non funzionano più su iPhone (ma su iPad sì)? 
Ho pensato di salvarmi la musica nel telefono, e quindi riprodurla con il lettore di sistem…ah no, su iPhone non si può. 
C’è “Musica”, ma non esplora i files locali. 
Ok, cerchiamo una app decente che faccia da f0ttuto music player, ci sarà pure, voglio dire, è un iPhone, non un 3310.
Oh, provate voi a trovare una app che faccia da SEMPLICE RIPRODUTTORE AUDIO, ma che esplori la musica locale salvata nel telefono.
Niente, introvabile.
A parte questa, che è tipo perfetta.
Fa esattamente quello che farebbe un programma su computer, esplorando seriamente il contenuto del telefono e permettendo di importare INTERE CARTELLE.
Così la vita si risolve facile, e ci piace.
Dunque per me è da 5 stelle 👌🏼🤙🏼

author: Matthew3749
title: Ottima, qualche bug qua e là
content:
Dal primo momento che ho visto l’app, me ne sono innamorato. Ci sono molte cose che la rendono unica, però voglio soffermarmi sulle caratteristiche che vi potrebbero essere più utili.
- Supporta i formati più comuni (MP3, AAC, FLAC, ALAC, WAV, ecc) sia dal cloud e locale, e il riconoscimento del metadata funziona molto bene. Attenzione, perché dal cloud il metadata non viene letto dai file FLAC e WAV.
- La sincronizzazione da cloud è un po’ “baggata”, alcune volte funziona, altre volte no. Stesso vale per la lettura del metadata. Alcune volte il numero (di tracce sincronizzate) rimane fermo, però i brani aumentano: ci vuole un po’ di pazienza!
- L’interfaccia è molto diversa dagli screenshot sull’App Store (almeno per iPad), ed è mooolto meglio!
- È ricchissima a livello di personalizzazione, per dirvi si possono cambiare i bottoni del player nella lock screen: tutto questo anche nella versione free! Nella premium, vengono tolte le pubblicità e le funzionalità rimangono le medesime.

Nota: (ovviamente) per cambiare i metadata di un brano, bisogna scaricarlo.

author: ЯΣƧidΣПƬ
title: Best Free Music Player
content: Been searching for a free music player as replacement for Apple Music, since they forced users to subscribe to play content. After test driving a dozen different apps over the past few months, I finally found this one. Initially a little confused with set up, but after uploading my iTunes collection to free cloud service Box using my iMac, I had access to my complete collection on my iPhone in a just a few minutes. So impressed they included so many features for free, including ability to set up customised playlists, change user interface, compatible with CarPlay to use in my car, as well as access to other cloud accounts when I finally eventually run out of 10Gb free space on Box. Considering what you get for free, this is quite simply the best option for someone like me who just wants to enjoy the music I have without buying into an expensive subscription services that rarely give users value for money.

author: Jon Kelling
title: Was fine until the last 2 updates
content: The app was great when I first got it, would be five stars, but lost a star after an update because the album covers thing got screwed up.  It would either choose its own, or not have one at all.  Other than that it still worked fine.  After this latest update, I’m very disappointed.  It stated that the album covers thing would be fixed, I go into the app and all but a few of the album covers are not there.  Just blank.  The ones that do have covers are not the original cover I chose for the album.  Just all the same picture from my Google drive.  When I chose edit image, it fixed it for just the album image, not the album images next to the songs.  And that’s not all, I can’t even upload songs from Garage Band to the app anymore.  I use Garage Band to make songs and I copy them to Evermusic.  Now, it doesn’t give that option.  It just says “Evermusic” and it loads the song and then nothing happens.  It’s not in there.  At first I thought this was a problem with the Garage Band app, but when I went into Evermusic I discovered that there is now an option to upload your songs from in the app by just choosing one from files.  I did, and it just loaded and loaded and didn’t do anything.  If you fix this stuff, I will change my rating to 5 stars.  Thank you in advance.

author: Aktz1n
title: Amazing! Bug has been fixed!
content:
Final edit: I am no longer having any problems with the app. The bug I described below is no longer happening. It is safe to say that this app, with the recent fixes, is probably the best offline music app on the appstore right now. Even if you don’t pay for the premium option (which is still worth it imo), you will most likely NOT be disappointed! Go on and listen to your favorite songs!

In terms of offline music apps, this one is the best. It has basically everything you could ask for. Equalizer, cloud storage compatibility, and much more! I have bought the pro version too, and it honestly brings it all together. However, there is one bug that is preventing five stars from me right now. Songs delete themselves off my playlist or my phone. I noticed this while I was mowing: playlists would stop playing after two songs, and if I tried to reload my playlist (press play all), those two songs would disappear! It kept happening until all my songs were gone. I re-downloaded my playlist to be sure, and sure enough, the same thing happened. I would love to give this app five stars, as it is, in my opinion, the best offline music player, but this bug has given me and quite a few others a headache trying to solve. Please try to roll out a fix!

Edit: after experimenting with pretty much every setting and testing in and out of the app, I found that the issue only occurred while my phone was off. I synchronized my offline music library, added a few songs to my playlist, and went through them while my phone was off. The repeat feature was on. Eventually, every song would be deleted off the playlist. The music also appeared to have been deleted off of my recently synced library. If the app developer reads this, can you look at how the music library is connected to having your phone off? Thank you!

title: Réseau non découvert en VPN
content:
L’application est très ergonomique, très agréable d’utilisation, toutefois un aspect bloque: la découverte réseau ne fonctionne pas en VPN. En effet, j’ai des NAS connectés en réseau auxquels je souhaite me connecter de l’extérieur (VPN en 4G) mais cette application renvoie tout de suite une erreur « non connecté au réseau », alors que d’autres apps me permettent tout à fait de le faire.
Si cette fonctionnalité était possible, ce serait un 5/5 sans hésiter, le souci étant qu’actuellement je suis obligé de télécharger la musique pour en profiter (hors une vingtaine de Go ça n’est pas autant que 5-6To en NAS)

title: Nach langer Suche fündig geworden!
content:
Für wen ist diese App geeignet? Ganz klar für Leute die das gleiche Problem haben wie ich, Lieder die es nicht bei ITunes gibt. Sie tut genau das was man erwartet. Für mich sind im Prinzip nur die Funktionen Musik zu importieren und die Funktion in einem längeren Song Lesezeichen zu erstellen wichtig. Eine bessere Alternative habe ich noch nicht gesehen, natürlich gibt es Werbung und einige Begrenzungen mit denen man aber mit genügend Datenvolumen sehr gut Leben kann. Ich bin sehr zufrieden, bis auf den Punkt das man nur eine begrenzte Anzahl an Liedern downloaden kann. :)
Ich spiele auf jeden Fall mit dem Gedanken mir die Pro Version zu kaufen. 
Grüße Chris

author: LucaTorto90
title: Top
content:
Sono un utente che dopo aver visto per 20 minuti com’era l’app free ho deciso immediatamente di passare alla premium. Con 5,49€ ho la versione premium per sempre, il che è una cosa fantastica. Ho aspettato quasi un mese per fare questa recensione proprio per cercare di essere il più capillare possibile. Vi riassumo qui i Pro e le cose che dal mio punto di vista vorrei vedere aggiunte. 

COSE PRO: 
- Il prezzo, davvero accessibile (considerate che è per sempre). 
- La possibilità di collegare ogni cloud possibile è una cosa fantastica. 
- La possibilità di creare tutte le playlist che si voglia potendo metterci il titolo e la copertina che si desidera.
- I continui aggiornamenti da parte degli sviluppatori fanno capire che c’è un lavoro continuo e che l’app non è lasciata a se stessa, anzi è sempre in miglioramento. 
- La possibilità di avere sia musica off-line cioè scaricata sul dispositivo, che ascoltarla on-line tramite internet dai propri cloud. 
- Quando importate la musica su quest app, se fate ricerca tag mette in automatico titolo e copertina delle canzoni rendendo la vita facile. 
- La possibilità di inviare canzoni a chiunque tramite messaggistica. 
- L’equalizzatore: per chi ascolta con delle cuffie serie si sente la differenza del suono. L’ho trovata una cosa molto utile e funzionale. 
- La possibilità di abilitare l’opzione “crossfade” per togliere quegli stacchi o silenzi odiosi da una canzone all’altra. 
- La possibilità di cambiare tema nell’app. Tema scuro e tema chiaro. 

MIGLIORAMENTI NECESSARI: 
- La possibilità di scaricare i file audio direttamente dall’App credo sia d’obbligo, ora devo usare un altra app (Documents) per scaricare i file audio per poi inviarmeli qui, il che è un po macchinoso.
- Sarebbe anche molto utile la possibilità di poter modificare i file audio. Quindi poter decidere di tagliare parte degli audio iniziali o finali che non servono. (Cosa indispensabile per chi scarica file audio) 
- La possibilità di poter mettere i testi delle canzoni (magari nel retro della copertina della canzone. Quando schiacci la copertina si gira e ti da il testo). 
- La possibilità di avviare tema chiaro e tema scuro direttamente quando si seleziona il tema scuro nell’iphone. 

Detto questo l’app è fatta davvero bene e credo che abbia un potenziale unico che se ben sviluppato rende il consumatore veramente felice di comprare la versione pro. Per questo do 4 stelle perché nonostante sia ben fatta è ancora molto migliorabile. 
Con le migliorie che ho annotato avrei speso anche di più dei 5,49€ che ho pagato. Comunque bravi continuate cosi 💪🏼👏🏼 e non smettete mai di ascoltare noi consumatori. Speriamo di aiutarvi nel migliorare l’app con le nostre idee.

Par contre une chose qui me gêne concerne la confidentialité et l’accès au autres dossiers de mon cloud car le développeur peut avoir accès et cela me dérange beaucoup. Il faudrait qu’il utilise le système de Token que permet Pcloud pour l’accès d’un seul dossier que l’on autorisera sans permettre de voir les autres. Je reste encore un peu et si je suis convaincu je passe à la caisse ;)

The app's been working beautifully for a taste-test-type of mp3 software or whatever, but there's something in the latest update that pauses the music outright when I open the photo app in both Default and Mixed mode. I tried to work with it at first, but it got really annoying as time went on, misswiping and simply trying to get shots of something every other moment, although it keeps playing if I'm using my Voice Memos app at the same time, curiously enough.
That, and the file sizes stopped showing up in the...files...section. I'm not sure why that's gone in the most recent update, I'd like to know how much of the 200 megabytes or so my podcasts are taking up, haha.
Oh! and the music speeds are kind of funky. I usually don't mind the crumbly bumbly nature of them, but as I took up listening to Crystal Castles again, not being able to hear the changes in pitch from the .95 and 1.05 speeds kind of bums me out. Again, no dealbreaker, but things keeping me from considering this app absolutely perfect. I'd buy it several times over if I could.

author: Lordradish
title: Basically flacbox with some bugfixes
content:
I love their other app, Flacbox, but it has a lot of bugs that seem to not have ever been fixed. such as I could never get it stream FLAC'S from my NAS. This one does, so I feel like I'm essentially paying for the same app, twice. I don't know why they couldn't have just fixed FLACBOX, instead of getting us to pay again for what is essentially the same app.

Only bug I can see in this one is that when you load an folder to play (not in a Playlist) it seems to play the songs in alphabetical order instead of by track number, which is frustrating. It also needs the ability to view your online music by folder, as now it just does it by artist or album or song, which can be frustrating when you have your collection organized a certain way and know how to get to what you want, quickly.

Good program, but not happy about essentially paying for it twice.

author: DanielGeb22
title: Almost perfect, but needs some fix
content:
This music player has a really good interface, as well as for its file manager. But there are some things I have to point out : First, there’s a noticeable lag every time you change tracks in the lockscreen, so try fixing that. Something you should add to the app, is being able to share or export multiple songs at the same time, compared to only being able to export one track at a time (for now). Because right now, I have like 500 songs stored into Evermusic, and if I want to export them for some reason to the stock Files app (in case Evermusic stops working for some reason and I lose all my songs), I would have to export them one by one which takes forever to do so, whereas if you allow us to export a bunch of songs at the same time, that would be much more easier. One more thing, is being able to import pictures from the camera roll to change album artworks, instead of being limited to only cloud storages (G Drive, Dropbox...).
Other than those problems, the app is great.

author: betsyyreyes
title: it’s just that, amazing.
content:
Although not perfect. I just upgraded my phone to the eleven max pro and it had refused to let my old app (musicloud pro) download onto it since it is no longer in the appstore. And evermusic was the best bet I can find to something akin to my old app. All my music was downloaded with ease, and I absolutely love the organization feature so I can rename all my files! The music plays nicely, the templates offered are absolutely insane and I just love everything about the app. The only thing I must comment on though is the file photo cover.

I tried many times to switch the covers with one of my own from dropbox but it never loads, although my personal photos will load onto playlist covers. I just wish there was a way to fix this, and to edit album covers (so that all the songs from the specific album can have the same personalized photo automatically) just like I can edit playlist covers. The file covers they have accumulated from the internet are mostly abhorrent and I just can’t stand them lol. I’ve seen that this has been a problem from the past from other reviews as well. Other than that, this app is still amazing and I’d drop my money on it again any day!

author: mailmonster
title: Please fix
content:
This review comes in two weeks after the upgrade so I had enough time trying.

The offline feature needs syncing with the playlist page. Whenever new songs are added, the playlists breaks essentially and needed internet to download existing files again even if the files are there in the offline, playlist folder. It paints the false picture where the offline function is not working, and since this is one of the main features of this app, it fails to perform. One solution for me is to toggle the offline button each time a single song is added to the playlist and essentially it clears all your downloads and download everything again. 

I have disabled data usage for this app so it reveals this bug, very annoying when I thought the app is not delivering but then I have located the downloaded files at the back. The random and other functions are disabled, so it’s very limited. 

Alternatively, I can add these downloaded songs back into a playlist from the download folder, but it breaks again as soon as new files are added back to the playlist. These should not have happened if this was tested before release.

Another problem is the need to download multiple copies of the same song if it’s in more than one playlist. I know it’s not as big of a problem compared to the main issue above, but it’s not what I’m expecting.

A major improvement would be able to bulk change the album title. I have a stack of old collections that are saved with non Unicode characters, while the metadata id3 function tries to correct these, it does not work all the time and given its best to fix at source, it will be good if I can just type in the new name of the album once and just click save to update the files.

title: No longer forced to repurchase all your music digitally!
content: I have an extensive cd and vinyl collection and I was getting pretty fed up with Apple making it harder and harder to take the music I already physically own along with me. Evermusic allows you to rip your own cd’s, upload it to one of many cloud services and then make those files available offline again via their own app. Although Apple itself should just allow you to drag and drop your files freely, I am immensely grateful to Evermusic for making sure I can finally have all my music with me in offline form without having to pay for it over and over again.

author: David JH
title: Suite of selectively disabled apps suite of apps that are so very unstable
content:
Crashes constantly trying to sync with a not very large dlna library of around 3000 tracks.

Graphic equaliser UI too small to adjust with any meaningful accuracy 

Everappz producrs a very confusing suite of apps that all seem close to completely identical , but the differences are sooo subtle and just silly. 

To get the full possibility of features you need to actually buy a few different app versions from same developer..eg cross fade is disabled not in Flacbox, but available in Evermusic and evermusic pro. 24bit audio support is available in flacbox but disabled  evermusic or ever music pro., but, Flacbox can’t see locally stored podcasts but the other two evermusic apps can. ??? This incredibly subtle product differentiation seems designed not to produce the best and most comprehensive app, but to force you to buy multiple versions just to have the features you’d need.

Great product, very pleased!

title: Não conseguiram aplicar usabilidade
content: Apesar de muitas funcionalidades, para merecer compra, precisa ganhar uma coisa bem ÓBVIA: um botão “Home” para permitir retorno em qualquer tela. Após a reprodução de uma música, na tela de player, é necessário FECHAR e REABRIR o aplicativo para retorno às funcionalidades iniciais (UM ABSURDO!). Caso exista uma forma de voltar, peca gravemente, pois exige análise exaustiva, mostrando que não é intuitivo. E se não existir retorno mesmo, é um erro muito grave. O usuário não pode procurar pela função por mais de 10 segundos. Os apps evoluíram e um especialista de usabilidade não atuou na concepção do aplicativo.

title: 動画広告
content:
クラウドに置いた音楽をそのまま再生できてとても使いやすかったのですが、少し前から過剰な広告が表示されるようになりました。
大音量の動画広告がドカンと再生されるようになり、操作性がかなり低下しました。

ある程度の広告が必要なのは理解していますが、あまりにもやり過ぎるとユーザーは離れていきます。そうして消えていったアプリをいくつも見てきました。開発者にはそうなる前に早く気付いてほしいと願います。

追記
過剰な動画広告を止めてくださいました。アプリを立ち上げた時に全面広告もしくは動画広告が1度表示されるだけになりました。無料アプリなら我慢できる範囲です。星2から星4に戻します。

author: JoJo Moreno
title: Bueno
content:
Básicamente, la aplicación cumple su objetivo: reproducir la música alojada en la nube personal. Solo por eso no se ha ido de mi IPhone. Pero a la hora de crear u organizar una lista el comportamiento es poco claro y engorroso. Solo se puede crear y organizar una playlist desde el apartado "Listas" e ir a buscar los archivos o carpetas para añadirlos. Al contrario del apartado "Nube", no se puede elegir una o varias canciones para incorporarlas a una lista "X". No hay manera.
El apartado "Biblioteca" es sencillamente malo. Muestra una lista de medios sin diferenciar audios de videos (a menos que seas un entendido y hayas activado "ver las exenciones" de los archivos en "Configuración"). No indica la cantidad de archivos en la biblioteca. Es importante señalar que no se ven los videos, solo reproduce sus audios. En esta biblioteca, no puedes seleccionar varios archivos, tanto para añadirlos a una lista o quitarlos. Tampoco puedo quitarlos en grupo si quisiera, solo uno por uno.
No comentaré como funciona la opción para descargar los archivos, me niego a utilizarla. Solo decir que así también como para añadir archivos a una lista, para descargar no puedo elegir varios, solo es uno por uno. Creo que la opción descargar será muy útil para quien tenga el suficiente espacio para tener parte o toda la biblioteca en su equipo. Para entonces, mi parecer, ya no tendría sentido la nube. 
El temporizador de apagado es práctico (no se hasta que punto).
Los efectos y su diseño le dan un toque moderno y lo hacen sencillo pero bonito. 
Creo que aun pueden mejorar, los estaré esperando.

author: JCandava
title: Wonderful app!!!
content:
I have never bought any app ever since I started using my first IOS device. Only this time. I am very satisfied with my purchase and I enjoy using this app very much. Those who have not used cloud storage and do not have the idea about the convenience of accessing files through the network, especially streaming music & movies, will never appreciate this program. But as for me I think 5 stars are not enough to describe my pleasure. 

I suggest that you include Apple Music queuing method (Play Next, Add to Up Next, & Add to a Playlist) if you can. Also I hope I can edit Account's credentials anytime and not re-typing everything  whenever I change network IP (like Document app). Likewise I think the position of an Airplay button should be placed rightmost. I frequently hit it accidentally whenever I try to adjust the volume slider from full to lower. 

Thank you and more power.
